title: Inventory child mortality and inequality data sources
outcome: A dated source inventory separating DHS mortality data, wealth-index data, intervention-coverage data, and unusable sources.
validation_method: Reviewer checks each source for URL, methodology, grain, and limitations.
done_condition: At least five sources classified as usable, limited, or rejected with explicit reasons.

title: Estimate district-level under-five mortality with wealth disaggregation
outcome: District-level under-five mortality estimates by wealth quintile with confidence intervals and sample-size documentation.
validation_method: Replicator reruns estimation with alternative mortality models and confirms estimates within reported confidence intervals.
done_condition: District-level mortality estimates by wealth quintile, with sample-size adequacy flags for districts with fewer than 500 live births, and replication.

title: Track sub-national inequality trends across survey rounds
outcome: An inequality-trend analysis classifying districts as improving, worsening, or unchanged in mortality inequality across survey rounds.
validation_method: Replicator confirms trend classification methodology and validates against alternative inequality metrics.
done_condition: Trend map includes inequality-metric documentation, survey-round comparability notes, and replication.

title: Analyze intervention-coverage equity relative to mortality inequality
outcome: An equity analysis linking wealth-disaggregated intervention coverage to mortality inequality at district level.
validation_method: Replicator confirms equity methodology and validates coverage indicators.
done_condition: Coverage-equity analysis includes explicit non-causal caveats and replication.

title: Red-team misuse of inequality data
outcome: A failure-mode review identifying stigmatization of poor-performing districts, false-precision in small-area estimates, and misuse for punitive rather than supportive purposes.
validation_method: Reviewer confirms every high-risk failure mode has a mitigation or blocks publication, then a second reviewer replicates the failure-mode check.
done_condition: Every inequality claim includes sample-size caveats, non-stigmatization language, and is gated behind replication.

title: Check whether outputs match equity-oriented health planning needs
outcome: A field-facing review of whether inequality-trend maps change equity-oriented resource allocation or outreach strategy responsibly.
expected_artifact: playbooks.md update with use and non-use guidance.
validation_method: Field reviewer identifies the actual decision, user, timing, and misuse risk for the output, then a second reviewer replicates the non-use-case check.
done_condition: Output has named user, named decision, explicit non-use cases, small-sample caveats, and replicated field-reality review.
